hero.title: The Bride!
hero.overview: A lonely Frankenstein travels to 1930s Chicago to ask groundbreaking scientist Dr. Euphronious to create a companion for him. The two revive a murdered young woman and The Bride is born. But what ensues is beyond what either of them imagined.

forecast_cards.title: The Bride!
forecast_cards.overview: A lonely Frankenstein travels to 1930s Chicago to ask groundbreaking scientist Dr. Euphronious to create a companion for him. The two revive a murdered young woman and The Bride is born. But what ensues is beyond what either of them imagined.

forecast_cards.title: People We Meet on Vacation
forecast_cards.overview: Poppy's a free spirit. Alex loves a plan. After years of summer vacations, these polar-opposite pals wonder if they could be a perfect romantic match.

forecast_cards.title: Project Hail Mary
forecast_cards.overview: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction… but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.

forecast_cards.title: The Wrecking Crew
forecast_cards.overview: Estranged half-brothers Jonny and James reunite after their father's mysterious death. As they search for the truth, buried secrets reveal a conspiracy threatening to tear their family apart.

forecast_cards.title: The Rip
forecast_cards.overview: Trust frays when a team of Miami cops discovers millions in cash inside a run-down stash house, calling everyone — and everything — into question.

forecast_cards.title: Shelter
forecast_cards.overview: A man living in self-imposed exile on a remote island rescues a young girl from a violent storm, setting off a chain of events that forces him out of seclusion to protect her from enemies tied to his past.

forecast_cards.title: The Singers
forecast_cards.overview: An impromptu singing contest at a dive bar turns a lonely night into a soul-baring moment of shared harmony.

forecast_cards.title: Whistle
forecast_cards.overview: A misfit group of unwitting high school students stumble upon a cursed object, an ancient Aztec Death Whistle. They discover that blowing the whistle and the terrifying sound it emits will summon their future deaths to hunt them down.

forecast_cards.title: Cold Storage
forecast_cards.overview: When a mutating, highly contagious fungus escapes a sealed facility, two employees – joined by a grizzled bioterror operative – must survive the wildest night shift ever to save humanity from extinction.

forecast_cards.title: Primate
forecast_cards.overview: Lucy, a college student, along with her friends, spend their vacation at her family's home in Hawaii, which includes her pet chimpanzee, Ben. However, when Ben contracts rabies after being bitten by a rabid animal, the group must fight for their lives in order to avoid the now-violent chimp.

forecast_cards.title: The Bluff
forecast_cards.overview: When her tranquil life on a remote island is shattered by the return of her vengeful former captain, a skilled ex-pirate must confront her bloody past and unleash her deadly talents to save her family from a ruthless siege.

forecast_cards.title: One Mile: Chapter Two
forecast_cards.overview: Former special forces operative Danny is forced back onto a remote island when a violent, secretive community takes revenge by abducting his daughter Alex, launching a relentless hunt against enemies prepared for his every move.

rows.film: All Quiet on the Western Front
Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
Do Not Expect Too Much From the End of the World
The American Society of Magical Negroes
Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery

actual_winners.film: Birdman or (The Unexpected Virtue of Ignorance)
The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King

methodology.headline: Forecasts are generated from historical Best Picture nominee data using a walk-forward gradient boosting model.
bullets: Historical races are scored using only prior years to reduce data leakage.
Future races rely on TMDb-first movie pool data and refresh as new releases arrive.
Future forecasts now use a season-aware blend that shifts weight from prestige signals early in the year toward critic and awards-style signals later in the race.
